chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6149 of 2021 a/w C.P. No.D-3207 of 2022 and 2031 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.22836/2021. 2. For orders on CMA No.20517/2022. 3. For hearing of CMA No.26038/2021. 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Samad a/w Mr. Farooq Hashmat, advocates for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Arif, advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Ashfaq Rafiq Janjua, advocate for intervener. Mr. Khurram Ghayasuddin, Advocate for KMC Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. These petitions concern an illegal encroachment. Learned counsel for the KMC states that KMC is fully aware of these petitions. The Mayor Karachi is directed to proceed in accordance with law and remove any illegal encroachment which they may be after giving opportunity of hearing to parties. The Mayor Karachi shall pass appropriate order within three months from today, in accordance with law. All the petitions stands disposed of along with pending applications. Copy of this order shall be sent to Mayor Karachi for compliance. Office to place a copy of this order in each connected petition. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Ayaz Gul
